proposals.title: Create missing pipeline spec files
proposals.newText: Create all four files from rules already codified in CLAUDE.md, site specs, and agents.json — so agents that try to read them don't fail silently.
proposals.reason: All four files are referenced in agents.json prompts (Quill, Mindy, Prism, Scout) but confirmed missing from the workspace — any spawned agent will fail when trying to read them.

proposals.title: Fix stale SmartCrawl reference in BB site spec
proposals.location: Technical Notes section, redirect map line
proposals.oldText: - 301 redirect map for 16 pre-pipeline deleted posts in `birthday-best-audit.md` — still requires manual SmartCrawl entry (pre-dates Redirection plugin install)
proposals.newText: - 301 redirect map for 16 pre-pipeline deleted posts in `birthday-best-audit.md` — these predate the Redirection plugin install and have not yet been created. Use Redirection plugin REST API when ready.
proposals.reason: SmartCrawl has been replaced by the Redirection plugin — the note still references it as the method, which is incorrect.

proposals.title: Add Tier 1 / Tier 2 market tiers explicitly to Scout and Quill prompts
proposals.newText: Add a concise 'Geographic Audience' section to both Scout and Quill prompts: Tier 1 = US, UK, Australia, Canada. Tier 2 HV = New Zealand, Germany, Netherlands, Nordics. Do not target beyond these.
proposals.reason: Currently Scout and Quill inherit market targeting from reading per-site specs — making it explicit in the prompt is more reliable and survives context where site spec isn't read first.

proposals.title: Scheduled daily review loses state across context breaks
proposals.newText: Note that the daily learning review task should save proposals.json before sending the message — not after. If the session is interrupted, the proposals are preserved and the review can resume from the saved file rather than starting over.
proposals.reason: Yesterday's Apr 7 learning review identified and drafted proposals but was interrupted before saving proposals.json — when the session resumed it had no record of the proposals and couldn't send them.
